_comment: Named variants for scheduleProgramActivationDeactivationDates CTs. These are NOT consumed by buildRequestBody() — instead, import PROGRAM_DATE_VARIANTS from src/data/test-programs.ts which exposes typed objects with ISO-date functions evaluated at runtime. This file serves as human-readable documentation of the intent of each variant.

active_today._description: Program active right now: activationDate=yesterday, deactivationDate=tomorrow, active=true. Backend will recompute active=true from window.

inactive_future._description: Program with future activation: activationDate=today+30, deactivationDate=null. Flag active=true is overridden by backend — date window makes it inactive. Use for CT-API-05.

inactive_past._description: Program with past deactivation: activationDate=null, deactivationDate=yesterday. Backend recomputes active=false.

both_null._description: No date bounds set: program is always active. activationDate=null, deactivationDate=null, active=true.

invalid_order._description: activationDate > deactivationDate — backend must return 400. Use for CT-API-06.

same_day._description: activationDate == deactivationDate == today. Program is active for exactly one day. Use for CT-24.
